home.install.subtitle: Install the PWA
home.hero.description:
Join the decentralized treasure hunting adventure powered by Nostr.
Hide treasures, find them, and connect with explorers worldwide.
home.hero.descriptionAdventure:
Join a fellowship of adventurers on an ancient quest powered by mystical networks.
Conceal treasures, discover legendary treasures, and forge bonds with fellow adventurers across the realm.
home.features.title: Why Treasures?
home.features.decentralized.title: Decentralized
home.features.decentralized.description: Your treasures are stored on the Nostr network, ensuring they're always accessible and censorship-resistant.
home.features.decentralized.descriptionA: Your treasures are safeguarded by mystical networks, ensuring they remain eternal and beyond the reach of dark forces.
home.features.community.title: Community Driven
home.features.community.description: Connect with fellow explorers, share experiences, and build lasting friendships through adventure.
home.features.community.descriptionAdven: Unite with fellow adventurers, share tales of glory, and forge unbreakable bonds through epic quests.
home.features.global.title: Global Adventure
home.features.global.description: Discover treasures hidden by explorers from around the world, each with its own unique story and challenge.
home.features.global.descriptionAdventur: Uncover treasures concealed by legendary explorers across distant lands, each bearing ancient secrets and trials.
home.geocacheBlurb: Treasures is a free, open-source geocaches app built on Nostr.
home.howItWorks.title: How It Works
home.howItWorks.description: Three simple steps to start your treasure hunting adventure.
home.howItWorks.step1.title: Hide a Treasure
home.howItWorks.step1.description: Pick a spot, generate a QR code, and hide a treasure somewhere exciting for others to discover.
home.howItWorks.step2.title: Find & Claim
home.howItWorks.step2.description: Explore the map, head to a treasure location, and scan its QR code to log your verified find.
home.howItWorks.step3.title: Share the Adventure
home.howItWorks.step3.description: Leave a log, share your experience, and connect with fellow explorers from around the world.
home.curated.title: Treasures Waiting in the World
home.curated.description:
Real treasures hidden by real people in incredible places around the world.
Go find them.
home.curated.descriptionAdventure:
Legendary treasures concealed by brave adventurers in far-flung corners of the realm.
Will you answer the call?
home.recent.title: Recently Hidden Treasures
home.recent.description: Discover the newest treasures hidden by adventurers around the world. Each one waiting for you to find it.
home.recent.descriptionAdventure: Uncover the latest treasures concealed by legendary explorers across the realm. Each one holds ancient secrets awaiting discovery.
claim.title: Claim Treasure
claim.description: To claim a treasure (log a verified find), use the QR code within the treasure.
claim.instructions.mobile: Use your camera to scan the QR code - it will should automatically detect it!
claim.instructions.desktop: Use your phone's camera to scan the QR code, then enter the link below
claim.scan.description.mobile: Most camera apps can automatically detect QR codes or include a 'QR Scan' mode
claim.scan.description.desktop: Use your mobile device to scan the QR code
claim.step1.desktop: Get your phone and open the Camera app
claim.step1.hint.mobile: The default camera app works best
claim.step1.hint.desktop: Most phones have QR scanning built-in
claim.step2.title: Point the camera at the QR code
claim.step2.hint: Make sure the entire QR code is visible and well-lit
claim.step3.desktop: Copy the treasure link that appears
claim.step3.hint.mobile: Your phone will show a notification to open the link
claim.step3.hint.desktop: Then paste it in the form below
claim.proTips.title: Pro Tips:
claim.proTips.tip1: Hold your phone steady about 6-12 inches from the QR code
claim.proTips.tip2: Make sure there's good lighting (avoid shadows and glare)
claim.proTips.tip3: If it doesn't work immediately, try moving slightly closer or further away
claim.proTips.tip4: If scanning fails, you can manually type the URL below
claim.manual.description.mobile: You can open the link from your phone's camera directly, or paste the URL provided here
claim.manual.description.desktop: After scanning with your phone, paste the treasure link here
claim.manual.label: Treasure Link
claim.manual.example: The link should look like this:

about.title: About Treasures
about.subtitle: A decentralized geocaches app on the Nostr protocol. Open, community-owned, and free.
about.geocaching.title: What are Geocaches?
about.geocaching.description1: Geocaches are hidden containers placed at GPS coordinates for others to find. They can be found in urban areas, parks, forests, and remote locations around the world.
about.geocaching.description2: Each geocache contains a logbook where finders can record their visit, and larger caches may contain small trinkets for trading. The game combines outdoor adventure, problem-solving, and exploration, encouraging people to discover new places and hidden gems in their communities.
about.treasures.title: What is Treasures?
about.treasures.description1: Treasures is a free, open-source geocaches app built on Nostr. Instead of centralized servers, your treasures and logs are stored across a network of relays. No single entity controls the data. Hide, find, and log treasures with your Nostr identity.
about.treasures.description2: With Treasures, you can hide, find, and log treasures using your Nostr identity. The platform supports real-time updates and seamless integration with the broader Nostr ecosystem. Your activity is tied to your cryptographic identity, ensuring authenticity while maintaining privacy.
about.treasures.feature1.title: Decentralized
about.treasures.feature2.title: Censorship Resistant
about.treasures.feature2.description: No one can take it down
about.treasures.feature3.title: Community Owned
about.treasures.feature4.title: Real-time
about.cacheTypes.title: Treasure Types
about.cacheTypes.description: Three styles of hide, each with their own challenge.
about.cacheTypes.traditional.title: Traditional
about.cacheTypes.traditional.description: A container at the posted coordinates with a logbook inside.
about.cacheTypes.multi.title: Multi-Cache
about.cacheTypes.multi.description: Follow a sequence of clues to reach the final cache.
about.cacheTypes.mystery.title: Mystery
about.cacheTypes.mystery.description: Solve a puzzle to figure out the real coordinates.
about.tech.title: Built With
about.tech.description1: Treasures runs on the Nostr protocol, a simple, open protocol for decentralized communication. Nostr uses relays to distribute data, so applications built on it can't be shut down or controlled by any single entity.
about.tech.description2.suffix: for building Nostr apps with modern web tech.
about.tech.feature1.title: Nostr Protocol
about.tech.feature2.title: Modern Stack
about.tech.feature3.title: Open Source
about.tech.feature4.title: Real-time
about.nip.title: Nostr Event Kinds
about.nip.description: Treasures uses custom Nostr event kinds defined in NIP-GC.
about.nip.kind1.title: Kind {{kind}}
about.nip.kind1.description: Treasure listings with location, difficulty, terrain, and details
about.nip.kind2.title: Kind {{kind}}
about.nip.kind2.description: Found logs recording successful treasure visits
about.nip.kind3.title: Kind {{kind}}
about.nip.kind3.description: Verification events providing cryptographic proof of finds
about.nip.kind4.title: Kind {{kind}}
about.nip.kind4.description: Comment logs for DNF, notes, and maintenance
about.faq.title: FAQ
about.faq.a1: Geocaches are hidden containers placed at GPS coordinates for others to find. They typically contain a logbook to sign, and larger ones may hold small trinkets for trading. They can be found in parks, cities, forests, and remote locations worldwide.
about.faq.a2: Yes. Treasures is completely free and open source. There are no fees, subscriptions, or premium tiers.
about.faq.q3: Do I need a Nostr account?
about.faq.a3: You can browse the map and view treasures without an account. To hide treasures, log finds, or save favorites, you'll need a Nostr identity. You can create one for free right from the app.
about.faq.q4: How do I find a treasure?
about.faq.a4: Open the map, pick a treasure near you, and head to its coordinates. When you arrive, look for the hidden container and scan its QR code to log a verified find.
about.faq.a5: Your treasures, logs, and profile are stored on Nostr relays, not on a single company's server. You own your cryptographic keys, so you control your identity and data.
about.faq.a6: No. Treasures is an independent, decentralized app with no affiliation to Geocaching.com or Groundspeak. It's built on the open Nostr protocol.
about.faq.q7: How is this different from Geocaching.com?
about.faq.a7.intro: Treasures is built on a decentralized protocol. Here's how that changes things:
about.footer.description: Treasures is open source and community-driven.

filters.title: Filters
generateQR.loginRequired: Log in to generate QR codes for your treasures.
generateQR.title: Generate QR Code
generateQR.description: Print a QR code and place it inside your treasure. Finders scan it to log a verified discovery.
generateQR.preview.heading: Your QR Code
generateQR.sheet.title: Sheet Codes
generateQR.sheet.description: 9 unique QR codes generated. Copy each claim URL to link them to a listing later.
generateQR.stamp.title: Stamp Codes
generateQR.stamp.description: 42 compact QR codes generated. Hide each one separately and scan to set up its listing.
generateQR.details.title: Treasure Details
generateQR.details.description: Save the claim URL — you'll need it to set up the listing later.
generateQR.toast.generationFailed.title: QR Generation Failed
generateQR.toast.downloaded.title: QR Code Downloaded
blog.empty.title: No posts found
blog.empty.descriptionFiltered: Try adjusting your search or filter criteria.
blog.empty.descriptionNoPosts: No blog posts have been published yet.
blog.loading.title: Loading blog posts...
blog.error.title: Failed to load blog posts
blog.error.description: There was an error loading the blog. Please try again later.
blog.delete.confirm.title: Delete Blog Post
blog.delete.confirm.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.
blog.delete.success.title: Success
blog.delete.error.title: Error
blog.post.loading.title: Loading blog post...
blog.post.notFound.title: Blog post not found
blog.post.notFound.description: The blog post you're looking for doesn't exist or has been removed.
install.title: Install Treasures App
install.description: Get the full geocaches experience with our Progressive Web App. Loads faster and feels like a native app.
install.alreadyInstalled: App already installed! You can access Treasures from your home screen or app drawer.
install.readyDescription: Your browser supports app installation. Click below to add Treasures to your device.
install.manualDescriptionNoInstall: Add Treasures to your home screen for the best app experience. Follow the instructions below for your device.
install.manualDescriptionInstallable: If the install button above doesn't work, you can manually add Treasures to your home screen.
install.safari.step1: Tap the Share button (square with arrow up)
install.safari.step2: Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"
install.benefitFasterDescription: Instant loading and smooth navigation with cached resources.
install.benefitAvailableDescription: Access your geocaches and maps anytime, anywhere.
install.benefitNativeDescription: Full-screen experience that feels like a native mobile app.
install.benefitHomeDescription: Quick access from your device's home screen or app drawer.
adventures.title: Adventures
adventures.subtitle: Choose Your Journey. Find Your Treasures.
adventures.heroDescription: Multi-treasure quests across real-world locations. Every adventure is a story waiting to be lived.
adventures.errorDescription: Please check your connection and try again.
adventures.emptyDescription: No adventures have been posted yet. Be the first to chart a course for the community.
adventureDetail.notFoundDescription: This adventure may have been removed or the link is invalid.
adventureDetail.noTreasures: No treasures in this adventure yet.
createAdventure.descriptionCreate: Curate a treasure hunt for the community.
createAdventure.loginRequiredCreate: Please log in with Nostr to create an adventure.
createAdventure.loginRequiredEdit: Please log in with Nostr to edit this adventure.
createAdventure.notOwnerDescription: You can only edit your own adventures.
createAdventure.notOwnerMessage: This adventure belongs to another user.
createAdventure.notFoundMessage: This adventure may have been removed or the link is invalid.
createAdventure.stepDescriptions.details: Name your adventure and add a description.
createAdventure.stepDescriptions.locatio: Set the center and radius to find nearby treasures.
createAdventure.stepDescriptions.treasur: Review the treasures included in your adventure.
createAdventure.uploadFailedDescription: Could not upload image. Please try again.
createAdventure.titleRequiredDescription: Give your adventure a name before continuing.
createAdventure.locationRequiredDescript: Drop a pin on the map to set the adventure center.
createAdventure.noTreasuresFoundDescript: Try increasing the radius or choosing a different location.
createAdventure.treasuresRequiredDescrip: Keep at least one treasure in your adventure.
createAdventure.publishFailedDescription: Something went wrong. Please try again.
createAdventure.fieldSummaryPlaceholder: Find all the hidden treasures at the festival!
createAdventure.fieldSummaryHelp: Shown on cards in the browse page.
createAdventure.fieldDescriptionPlacehol: Describe the adventure — rules, tips, what to expect...
createAdventure.fieldPageThemeHelp: Default theme shown to visitors (won't override their preference).
createAdventure.fieldMapStyleHelp: Default map style for the adventure page.
createAdventure.tapToMove: Tap the map to move the center
createAdventure.searchOrTap: Search above or tap the map to set the center
createAdventure.tapToDeselect: Tap a treasure to deselect it.
createAdventure.noTreasuresInArea: No treasures in this area. Go back and adjust the radius.
remoteLogin.verifying: Please wait while we verify your session.
remoteLogin.timeoutDescription: We couldn't detect an active login session.
relayError.connectionDescription: Unable to connect to your relays. Check your connection or manage your relays in Settings.
relayError.noTreasuresDescription: No treasures were found on your relays.
shareDialog.title: Share Treasure
searchRelays.appDescription: Default relays that support NIP-50 full-text search. Used to find treasures by name.
searchRelays.appEnabled: App search relays will be used alongside your personal search relays.
searchRelays.appDisabled: Only your personal search relays will be used.
searchRelays.yourDescription: Your personal NIP-50 search relays. Synced to Nostr as a kind 10007 event when logged in.
searchRelays.empty: No personal search relays configured. Add a relay below or enable App Search Relays above.
searchRelays.invalidUrlDescription: Please enter a valid WebSocket URL (e.g., wss://relay.example.com)
searchRelays.publishedDescription: Your search relay list has been published to Nostr.
searchRelays.publishFailed: Failed to publish search relay list
searchRelays.publishFailedDescription: There was an error publishing your search relay list to Nostr.
searchRelays.loginHint: Log in to sync your search relay list with Nostr
blossomServers.appDescription: Default file upload servers for reliable media hosting. Used alongside your personal servers when enabled.
blossomServers.appEnabled: App Blossom servers will be used alongside your personal servers.
blossomServers.appDisabled: Only your personal Blossom servers will be used.
blossomServers.yourDescription: Your personal Blossom server list. Synced to Nostr when logged in. Files are mirrored across all servers for redundancy.
blossomServers.empty: No personal Blossom servers configured. Add a server below or enable App Blossom Servers above.
blossomServers.invalidUrlDescription: Please enter a valid HTTPS URL (e.g., https://blossom.example.com/)
blossomServers.publishedDescription: Your Blossom server list has been published to Nostr.
blossomServers.publishFailed: Failed to publish Blossom server list
blossomServers.publishFailedDescription: There was an error publishing your server list to Nostr.
blossomServers.loginHint: Log in to sync your Blossom server list with Nostr
blossomServers.compressDescription: Resizes large images and picks the smallest format before uploading. Disable to upload images exactly as-is.
blossomServers.thumbnailDescription: Resizes thumbnails in lists for faster scrolling. Detail pages always load full-size images directly.
troubleshooter.title: Publishing Issue Detected
troubleshooter.description: Let's help you get back to publishing your content.
troubleshooter.step.relaysUnavailable: Wait a moment and try again - relays may be temporarily unavailable
troubleshooter.step.checkOtherApps: Check if other Nostr apps are working
troubleshooter.step.slowConnection: Your internet connection may be slow
troubleshooter.step.mayHavePublished: Try again - the event may have been published successfully
troubleshooter.step.refreshPersists: Try refreshing the page if the issue persists
troubleshooter.step.clickRetry: Click the publish button again to retry
troubleshooter.step.approveSign: Make sure to approve the signing request in your Nostr extension
troubleshooter.step.needLogin: You need to log in with a Nostr account
troubleshooter.step.clickLogin: Click the login button to connect your account
troubleshooter.step.installExtension: Make sure you have a Nostr extension installed
troubleshooter.step.installNostrExt: Install a Nostr browser extension (like Alby, nos2x, or Flamingo)
troubleshooter.step.enableExtension: Make sure the extension is enabled
troubleshooter.step.refreshAfterInstall: Refresh the page after installing the extension
troubleshooter.step.checkPermission: Check that the extension has permission to access this site
troubleshooter.step.switchNetworks: Try switching networks (WiFi to mobile data or vice versa)
troubleshooter.step.disableVPN: Disable VPN if you're using one
troubleshooter.step.tryLater: Try again in a few minutes
troubleshooter.step.checkExtension: Make sure your Nostr extension is working
compactUrl.title: Generate Compact URLs
compactUrl.description: Create short URLs for pre-generated QR codes
settings.searchRelays.title: Search Relays
settings.searchRelays.description: NIP-50 relays used for full-text treasure search.
settings.blossom.title: Blossom Servers
settings.blossom.description: File upload servers for media hosting. Files are mirrored across all servers for redundancy.
createCache.draft.incompleteDescription: Please add a name, description, and location before saving.
createCache.draft.savedDescription: Your treasure draft is encrypted and only visible to you.
createCache.draft.savedLocallyDescriptio: Saved to this device. Relay sync failed — it will retry next time.
createCache.draft.editingNotice: Editing your saved draft. Publish when ready.
createCache.draft.continuingNotice: Continuing your draft from where you left off.
createCache.whatYouNeedDescription: A GPS location where you've placed (or plan to place) your cache, a name and description, and optionally some photos of the area.
createCache.locationConfirmation: By continuing, you confirm this location is publicly accessible, safe for finders, and that you have permission to place a cache here.
createCache.containerQuestion: What kind of container are seekers looking for?
createCache.ratingPreview: How this will appear to seekers
profile.draft.deleteDescription: "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
generateQR.styleDescriptions.sheet: Print 9 at once for multiple hides
locationPicker.searchPlaceholder: Search for a location or enter coordinates...
locationPicker.tapToSet: Tap the map to set your cache location
locationPicker.beaconHint: Blue beacon shows your current/searched location
locationPicker.formatHelp: Accepts: decimal, DMS, direction-suffixed, or Google Maps URLs
locationPicker.error.cannotParse: Could not parse coordinates. Try formats like "40.7128, -74.0060" or "40°42'46"N 74°00'22"W"
locationPicker.error.bothOutOfRange: Both values are out of range. Latitude must be -90 to 90, longitude -180 to 180.
locationPicker.error.lngOutOfRange: Longitude is out of range (must be -180 to 180).
locationPicker.warning.possibleSwap: Latitude is out of range (must be -90 to 90). Did you swap lat and lng?
locationPicker.warning.nearNullIsland: These coordinates are near 0,0 (Gulf of Guinea). Is this correct?
